text:
There once was a guy named Freddy who had a lot of ambition. He dreamed of becoming a famous chef, but his kitchen was always a mess. So, he decided that messiness meant creativity, and creativity was what he needed. Freddy devised a new recipe that combined every food he'd ever thrown together and named it 'Disaster Lovers Delight.' It became famous in town and started his culinary career. 

One night, after a particularly busy party where people were literally covered in Disaster Lovers Delight, Freddy pondered what his next big idea could be. A lightbulb cracked. He wanted to open a chocolate-themed restaurant. Chocolate was his signature, after all. He sketched out a concept for a haunted chocolate factory, complete with creaking doors, flickering lights, and faux rats lurking behind chocolate barrels.

The first night was scary and delicious. People dressed in costumes and ate until they couldn't move. Freddy watched with glee as his chocolate creations took on
